title: The Cable Television Networks (Regulation) Act, 1995
full_text: The Cable Television Networks (Regulation) Act, 1995 केबल टेलीविजन नेटवर्क (विनियमन)अधिनियम, 1995 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199507 Act Number: 07 Enactment Date: 1995-03-25 Act Year: 1995 Short Title: The Cable Television Networks (Regulation) Act, 1995 Hindi Title: केबल टेलीविजन नेटवर्क (विनियमन)अधिनियम, 1995 Long Title: An Act to regulate the operation of cable television networks in the country and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Information and Broadcasting Enforcement Date: 29-09-1994 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Cable Television Networks (Regulation) Act, 1995 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II REGULATION OF CABLE TELEVISION NETWORK CHAPTER III SEIZURE AND CONFISCATION OF CERTAIN EQUIPMENT CHAPTER IV OFFENCES AND PENALTIES CHAPTER V MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Cable television network not to be operated except after registration. Section 4. Registration as cable operator. Section 4A. Transmission of programmes through digital addressable systems, etc. Section 4B. Right of way for cable operators and permission by public authority. Section 5. Programme code. Section 6. Advertisement code. Section 7. Maintenance of register. Section 8. Compulsory transmission of certain channels. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Use of standard equipment in cable television network. Section 10. Cable television network not to interfere with any telecommunication system. Section 10A. Inspection of cable network and services. Section 11. Power to seize equipment used for operating cable television network. Section 12. Confiscation. Section 13. Seizure or confiscation of equipment not to interfere with other punishment. Section 14. Giving of opportunity to the cable operator of seized equipment. Section 15. Appeal. Section 16. Penalty for contravention of provisions of this Act. Section 17. Offences by companies. Section 18. Cognizance of offences. Section 19. Power to prohibit transmission of certain programmes in public interest. Section 20. Power to prohibit operation of cable television network in public interest. Section 21. Application of other laws not barred. Section 22. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 23. Repeal and savings.
